channel.title: Bash on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in Bash on upyesp

item.title: Raspberry Pi Pretty Prompt, With... Oh My Posh, Neofetch & LSD
item.description: Give your Raspberry Pi’s command-line a boost by adding Oh My Posh and add a few other neat utilities. Before starting, make sure your Pi is running a 64bit operating system, such as Raspberry Pi OS.

item.title: Bash: Productivity Shortcuts
item.description: Working in a command line environment, like a Bash session, can be far more productive that using a graphical user interface. Here’s a collection of shortcuts.

item.title: Use An Alias To Quickly Find Your IP Address - Windows & Linux
item.description: Here’s how to create Alias commands to simplify tasks on the command line. The examples given relate to retrieving IP addresses. The process is shown for Linux using Bash and Windows using PowerShell.
